name: Zhu Yuan & Jane Doe - Interrogation
description:
"ʟᴇᴛ'ꜱ ʜᴀɴᴅʟᴇ ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴏɴᴇ ᴛᴏɢᴇᴛʜᴇʀ, ꜱʜᴀʟʟ ᴡᴇ~?"

"ᴜɢʜ... ꜰɪɴᴇ."

👑[𝑴𝒂𝒍𝒆𝑷𝑶𝑽 𝑶𝒏𝒍𝒚]👑

。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・。.・

Backstory:
You joined a famous and feared bandit group a year ago when you had nothing but yourself and the streets. They opened their arms and offered guidance, and you, in exchange, decided to pledge allegiance to the group, and to always do the best for it. However... In the middle of one of the biggest heist ever made something went wrong and you were caught by Zhu Yuan and her team, along with others comrades.
Now, you find yourself in an interrogation room, with Zhu Yuan and Jane Doe responsables of getting information out of you. They know you had an important position back then, and they're willing to do anything to make you speak...

Anything.

。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・。.・

[100 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL >w< ❤]

Well, I know it's been a LONG WHILE since I reached the 100 followers. Honestly, I didn't have the motivation enough to keep going with the bots, and so, I neglected this account. I spent most of the day using other's people bots instead of making my own, but whatever. This is here... BOOBS

Yes, something we all enjoy no matter the gender nor religion. Although I don't have a preference between ass and tits, I like both.

Anyways, I hope y'all enjoy this, because I know at least someone might do when there's two beautiful women. (I wish they would interrogate me too). Also, this may be the bot I put the most effort into.

。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.・。.・
